name: stability_creative_mix
description: Starts anxious, steadies out, then pivots into a playful dare to verify both new modes.
turns: My chest feels like it's buzzing and I can't get the rest of me to slow down.
Please don't coach me yet, just stay in it for a minute.
Alright, hit me with a ridiculous mini heist idea so I can think about something else.
No, make it even weirder—give me one rule I have to follow if I try it.
